claim_status_history cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists claims cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists documents cascade Hibernate: create table ai_analysis_results (claim_amount_extracted float(53), risk_score integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), incident_date_extracted timestamp(6), processed_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, claim_id uuid not null unique, id uuid not null, policy_number varchar(100), recommended_action varchar(100), customer_name_extracted varchar(255), fraud_indicators TEXT, missing_documents TEXT, summary TEXT, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table claim_status_history (changed_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, claim_id uuid not null, changed_by varchar(255), new_status enum ('AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED','AI_REVIEW_IN_PROGRESS','APPROVED','CLOSED','DRAFT','MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED','PAID','PAYMENT_PENDING','REJECTED','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW') not null, old_status enum ('AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED','AI_REVIEW_IN_PROGRESS','APPROVED','CLOSED','DRAFT','MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED','PAID','PAYMENT_PENDING','REJECTED','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table claims (claim_amount numeric(15,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), incident_date timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, claim_type varchar(100) not null, policy_number varchar(100) not null, claimant_name varchar(255) not null, description TEXT, status enum ('AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED','AI_REVIEW_IN_PROGRESS','APPROVED','CLOSED','DRAFT','MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED','PAID','PAYMENT_PENDING','REJECTED','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table documents (created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), file_size bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, claim_id uuid not null, storage_provider varchar(20) not null, content_type varchar(100) not null, storage_path varchar(1000) not null, original_file_name varchar(255) not null, stored_file_name varchar(255) not null, upload_status enum ('DELETED','FAILED','PROCESSED','PROCESSING','UPLOADED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists documents add constraint from claims c1_0 where c1_0.id=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: shouldReturnFalseWhenExistsByIdAndSoftDeleted
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id from claims c1_0 where c1_0.id=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: shouldReturnTrueWhenExistsByIdAndActive
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id from claims c1_0 where c1_0.id=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: shouldReturnClaimsByPolicyNumber
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.claim_amount,c1_0.claim_type,c1_0.claimant_name,c1_0.created_at,c1_0.deleted_at,c1_0.description,c1_0.incident_date,c1_0.policy_number,c1_0.status,c1_0.updated_at from claims c1_0 where c1_0.policy_number=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null

testcase.name: shouldNotFindClaimByIdWhenSoftDeleted
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.claim_amount,c1_0.claim_type,c1_0.claimant_name,c1_0.created_at,c1_0.deleted_at,c1_0.description,c1_0.incident_date,c1_0.policy_number,c1_0.status,c1_0.updated_at from claims c1_0 where c1_0.id=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null

testcase.name: shouldReturnClaimsByStatus
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) testcase.name: shouldSearchClaimantNameIgnoringCase
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.claim_amount,c1_0.claim_type,c1_0.claimant_name,c1_0.created_at,c1_0.deleted_at,c1_0.description,c1_0.incident_date,c1_0.policy_number,c1_0.status,c1_0.updated_at from claims c1_0 where upper(c1_0.claimant_name) like upper(?) escape '\' and c1_0.deleted_at is null

testcase.name: shouldCountClaimsByStatus

testcase.name: shouldFindClaimByIdWhenActive
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into claims (claim_amount,claim_type,claimant_name,created_at,deleted_at,description,incident_date,policy_number,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.claim_amount,c1_0.claim_type,c1_0.claimant_name,c1_0.created_at,c1_0.deleted_at,c1_0.description,c1_0.incident_date,c1_0.policy_number,c1_0.status,c1_0.updated_at from claims c1_0 where c1_0.id=? and c1_0.deleted_at is null
